summary: 전체적으로 우수한 일관성. 4계층 색상 팔레트와 Noto Sans KR 폰트 준수율 높음. Ch08/Ch09 네이밍 불일치, Ch12 누락 파일 8개, Ch02 폰트 fallback 혼재가 주요 개선점.

ch12.status: ⚠️ 7 exist, but 8 MISSING referenced in HTML

findings.details: #F57F17 (dark yellow) used for Service text labels in ch03, ch08, ch09 instead of #FBBC04. Acceptable for text readability (contrast ratio improvement).
Ch05 DMA controller diagram uses #FF6D00 (orange) for DMA-specific elements, distinct from 4-layer palette. Used consistently across Ch05-Ch06 DMA diagrams.
findings.action: Acceptable — DMA is not a layer, it's a peripheral concept

findings.issue: Ch01 EXTI signal path uses non-standard purple (#7C4DFF, #9575CD, #CE93D8)
findings.details: HAL IRQ handler block uses purple color scheme instead of blue (#1A73E8). Only in ch01_sec04_exti_signal_path.svg and ch01_sec04_nvic_priority.svg.
findings.action: Consider — purple represents HAL interrupt handler, functionally distinct from HAL layer. Acceptable as signal-flow diagram (not architecture diagram).

findings.issue: Ch12 uses #4285F4 (Google blue) for SPI/hardware layer
findings.details: All 7 Ch12 SVGs use CSS class .spi with #4285F4 for hardware layer, slightly different from HAL #1A73E8.
findings.action: RECOMMEND FIX — #4285F4 should be #1A73E8 for HAL/hardware consistency

font_compliance.overall: ✅ Noto Sans KR used across all chapters

findings.issue: Ch02 adds 'Malgun Gothic' as secondary fallback
findings.details: 9 Ch02 SVGs use font-family='"Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif' — adds Windows Korean font as fallback. Functionally harmless but inconsistent with other chapters.
findings.action: Optional normalize — remove 'Malgun Gothic' for consistency

findings.issue: Styling approach varies: inline vs CSS <style>
findings.details: Ch01-Ch09 mostly use inline font-family attributes on SVG root. Ch10-Ch12 and some Ch01 use <defs><style> CSS classes. Both valid SVG approaches.
findings.action: No change needed — both approaches render correctly

findings.issue: Ch08 uses single-digit section numbers (sec0, sec1, ...sec8)
findings.details: Ch08 uses ch08_sec0_, ch08_sec1_, etc. instead of ch08_sec00_, ch08_sec01_. All other chapters (except Ch09) use two-digit format.
findings.action: RECOMMEND FIX — rename to ch08_sec00_, ch08_sec01_, etc. (requires HTML reference update)

findings.issue: Ch09 uses single-digit section numbers (sec0, sec1, ...sec8)
findings.details: Same issue as Ch08. ch09_sec0_, ch09_sec1_, etc.
findings.action: RECOMMEND FIX — rename to ch09_sec00_, ch09_sec01_, etc. (requires HTML reference update)

findings.issue: Ch01-Ch03 start section numbering at sec01, Ch04+ start at sec00
findings.details: Ch01: sec01-sec05, Ch02: sec01-sec06, Ch03: sec01-sec05. Ch04+: sec00 for architecture overview. Not a bug — Ch01-Ch03 predate the sec00 convention.
findings.action: No change needed — historical convention difference

missing_files.issue: 8 SVG files referenced in Ch12 HTML do not exist
missing_files.action: MUST FIX — Create these 8 SVG files or remove HTML references. Broken image links in published content.

architecture_4layer.consistency: ✅ All use HAL→Driver→Service→App layering with correct colors
architecture_4layer.style_variation: Ch03-Ch09: translucent fill + stroke border. Ch10-Ch12: CSS class-based solid fill. Minor visual difference but structurally consistent.

fsm_state_diagrams.consistency: ✅ All use circles/ellipses for states, arrows with markers for transitions
fsm_state_diagrams.style: Green (#34A853) for normal states, Red (#EA4335) for error/triggered states, Blue (#1A73E8) for idle/initial states, Yellow (#FBBC04) for acknowledged/pending states

present_in: ch03, ch04, ch05, ch06, ch07, ch10, ch12
sequence_diagrams.consistency: ✅ Vertical lifelines with horizontal message arrows

present_in: ch01 (push-pull vs OD), ch02 (SWO vs RTT), ch04 (polling vs interrupt), ch05 (polling vs DMA), ch07 (timer hierarchy), ch08 (TIM1 vs GP), ch12 (I2C vs SPI)
comparison_tables.consistency: ✅ Consistent table styling with header rows and alternating backgrounds

architecture_evolution.consistency: ✅ Clear v0.3 → v1.2 evolution across 10 architecture diagrams. All 4 layers progressively populated.

accessibility.text_as_svg_elements: ✅ All text uses SVG <text> elements (no text-as-image)
accessibility.contrast_ratio: ✅ All text colors against backgrounds meet 4.5:1 (verified: dark text on light fills, white text on dark fills)
accessibility.alt_text_in_html: ⚠️ Ch01-Ch11 HTML tags include descriptive alt text. Ch12 HTML tags also include alt text. PASS.

P0_critical.action: Create: ch12_sec01_spi_overview.svg, ch12_sec01_cpol_cpha.svg, ch12_sec02_dc_signal.svg, ch12_sec02_reset_sequence.svg, ch12_sec03_spi_dma_init.svg, ch12_sec03_dma_callback_timing.svg, ch12_sec04_dc_pin_transitions.svg, ch12_sec05_pixel_write_sequence.svg

P1_major.issue: Ch08 naming: sec0/sec1/.../sec8 instead of sec00/sec01/.../sec08
Ch09 naming: sec0/sec1/.../sec8 instead of sec00/sec01/.../sec08

P2_minor.issue: Ch12 uses #4285F4 instead of #1A73E8 for HAL/hardware
P2_minor.action: Replace .spi { fill: #4285F4 } with #1A73E8 in 7 Ch12 SVGs
Remove 'Malgun Gothic' from font-family in 9 Ch02 SVGs
